settings.description: CBSEM from demo/seminr-cbsem-cfa-ecsi.R: product_indicator Image*Expectation, paths to Value/Loyalty

lavaanModel:
# Latent Variable Definitions
Image =~ IMAG1 + IMAG2 + IMAG3 + IMAG4 + IMAG5
Expectation =~ CUEX1 + CUEX2 + CUEX3
Loyalty =~ CUSL1 + CUSL2 + CUSL3
Value =~ PERV1 + PERV2
Complaints =~ CUSCO
CUSCO ~~ 0*CUSCO
Image_x_Expectation =~ IMAG1_x_CUEX1 + IMAG1_x_CUEX2 + IMAG1_x_CUEX3 + IMAG2_x_CUEX1 + IMAG2_x_CUEX2 + IMAG2_x_CUEX3 + IMAG3_x_CUEX1 + IMAG3_x_CUEX2 + IMAG3_x_CUEX3 + IMAG4_x_CUEX1 + IMAG4_x_CUEX2 + IMAG4_x_CUEX3 + IMAG5_x_CUEX1 + IMAG5_x_CUEX2 + IMAG5_x_CUEX3

# Regressions
Value ~ Image + Expectation
Loyalty ~ Image + Expectation + Complaints + Image_x_Expectation

# Residual Covariances
CUEX3 ~~ PERQ1
CUEX3 ~~ PERQ2
CUEX2 ~~ IMAG1
